journal_entry.description: Refinance bank loan — old note replaced with new note
journal_entry.rationale: Refinancing replaces one liability with another. The old loan of $100 is extinguished (liability decrease via debit), and the new loan of $100 is established (liability increase via credit). This is a balance sheet restructuring transaction with no impact on income statement. No tax applies to debt refinancing under IFRS.

output.reason: Refinancing replaces one loan with another. The old loan liability is removed (liability decrease, which is a debit), and the new loan liability is established (liability increase, which is a credit). On the credit side: the new $100 note creates 1 liability increase.
